introSection: Speedy Maouse is a steel travelling roller coaster. It is owned by French showman Starck.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Pink track and blue supports. In the past, the supports were painted yellow.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars are the oldest style of Zyklon cars.

fullText:
Speedy Maouse is a steel travelling roller coaster. It is owned by French showman Starck.

Pink track and blue supports. In the past, the supports were painted yellow.

The cars are the oldest style of Zyklon cars.
